---
featured: true
title: "In silico detection of horizontal gene transfer in Streptomyces clavuligerus"
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the International Society for Computational Biology Student Council Webinar series 2020. 
date: "2020-05-19"
image: ISCBSC_Webinarseries_2020.png
categories:
- 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
- 🦠Microbiology
- 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event](http://webinars.iscbsc.org/who-we-are/){.btn target=_blank} [{{< fa play-circle >}} Oral presentation (English)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JEuAOEzI58Y&t=1156s){.btn target=_blank} [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/354368567_In_silico_detection_of_horizontal_gene_transfer_in_Streptomyces_clavuligerus){.btn target=_blank} 

You can find more details about this project [here][amp-hgt]. 

[amp-hgt]: ../../projects/Horizontal_gene_transfer/
